message:
fix(install_helpers): trim whitespace in migrated categories parsing

Handle cases where ACFS_GENERATED_MIGRATED_CATEGORIES contains spaces
around commas (e.g., "lang, cli" instead of "lang,cli").

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -417,6 +417,9 @@ _acfs_category_is_migrated() {
 
     local c=""
     for c in "${migrated_categories[@]}"; do
+        # Trim leading/trailing whitespace
+        c="${c#"${c%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
+        c="${c%"${c##*[![:space:]]}"}"
         [[ -n "$c" ]] || continue
         if [[ "${c,,}" == "${category,,}" ]]; then
             return 0
